summary: Iteration 71 - Frontend Testing: Spot Detail Drawer, Surf Conditions, Start Shooting Button, and Map Filters. All key features verified working correctly.

minor.issue: Expected - may be for missing data/resources

spot_detail_drawer.details: UnifiedSpotDrawer (data-testid='unified-spot-drawer') opens when clicking on a spot marker. Shows spot name, region, and surf conditions.

spot_conditions_current.details: SpotConditions component (data-testid='spot-conditions') displays: Current Conditions header with badge (e.g. 'Ankle High'), Wave Height (1.8ft), Swell (1.6ft), Direction (143°), Period (4.05s). Data attribution: 'Data from Open-Meteo Marine API'.

spot_conditions_tides.details: Today's Tides section shows Low/High tide times and heights. Shows 'Rising' or 'Falling' badge. Data attribution: 'Data from NOAA Tides & Currents'. Example: Low Tide 02:20 AM (-0.1ft), High Tide 08:37 AM (2.0ft).

start_shooting_button.details: 'Start Shooting' button (data-testid='start-shooting-btn') visible for photographers in the drawer header. Clicking it transitions to SETUP mode showing Live Session Rates configuration.

session_setup_mode.details: After clicking 'Start Shooting', drawer switches to SETUP mode with: Session Buy-in Price ($25), Photos Included (3), Price per Additional Photo ($5), Max Surfers (10), Auto-Accept toggle, and 'Confirm & Go Live' button.

map_filters.details: Filter buttons work correctly: 'All' (default), 'Surf Spots' (shows cluster markers), 'Photographers' (shows 0 when none live). Yellow highlight indicates active filter.

cluster_markers_zoom.details: Clicking cluster markers zooms the map and splits clusters into individual spot markers. Second click on individual marker opens spot drawer.

map_live_floating_island.details: MapLiveFloatingIsland component (data-testid='map-live-floating-island') is properly integrated in MapPage.js at line 1284. Conditionally renders when currentUserShooting is truthy. Contains LIVE indicator, timer, location, and End button.

request_pro_button.details: 'Request a Pro' button (data-testid='request-pro-btn') visible in filter row on map page.

critical_code_review_comments: SpotConditions correctly receives spotId and spotName props from UnifiedSpotDrawer
MapLiveFloatingIsland properly integrated below header, only shows when photographer has active session
Filter buttons correctly toggle between All/Surf Spots/Photographers with proper marker filtering
Cluster markers use Leaflet MarkerClusterGroup for performance optimization
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working: 1) Spot Detail Drawer shows Current Conditions (Wave Height, Swell, Direction, Period) and Today's Tides with NOAA data. 2) 'Start Shooting' button appears for photographers and opens session setup. 3) MapLiveFloatingIsland is integrated but only visible when photographer has active session. 4) Map filters work correctly. 5) Cluster markers zoom when clicked.
